name: Play Better Golf Now
about: Play Better Golf Now is a golf instruction studio focused on game improvement using advanced technology. The facility utilizes TrackMan technology to provide data-driven swing analysis and coaching for players of all skill levels. Lessons are available in 60-minute individual sessions or custom-length arrangements, with group instruction options for friends and colleagues. The studio is operated by a Class A PGA Professional with a specialized focus on teaching and coaching, and aims to help students develop strategic, practical steps to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Utilizes TrackMan technology to identify areas of improvement and measure progress accurately
Personalized 1-on-1 instruction focused on how each student learns best
Instructor has extensive experience, including coaching high school teams and PGA Junior League

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor for all lessons and analysis

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at the venue. It is best to confirm with the instructor directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on simulated 18-hole play times. This detail should be confirmed directly with the facility.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the instructor welcomes junior golfers and has experience with group instruction for children as young as three years old.
